description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly gray body and black, blocky engine nacelles or pods mounted on either side of the fuselage. The wings are sharply swept and integrated into the main body, giving it a stealthy, low-profile appearance. The nose is pointed and features a visible landing gear assembly, while the rear tapers off with a pair of vertical stabilizers. Yellow accent markings are present on the upper surfaces of the wings, and the word 'UNIT' is stenciled on both sides of the central fuselage. The cockpit is located at the front, with a dark, enclosed canopy. The overall design suggests a compact, possibly unmanned or single-pilot craft suitable for urban or tactical operations.
description: A compact, angular gray airplane with black side pods, swept wings, and a pointed nose, featuring yellow accents and a front-mounted cockpit. The design is sleek and modern, with visible landing gear and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, front landing gear, and the wide, angular wings with black pods and yellow accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low-profile fuselage, the black engine pods, and the angular, swept wing design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, the broad wings, and the tapering fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the black pods and the angular body contours.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and integrated engine pods; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into side pods
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a conventional tail arrangement
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with visible nose gear and main gear units
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy
